summary: Analytics Dashboard testing completed successfully. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified - 4 overview cards, Sitewide/Account scope filter, searchable listing filter dropdown, Views (3 time periods), Visits chart with 5 period toggles, Unique Views, Button Clicks, Devices, Top Countries, Top Referrers, Top Platforms, Top Browsers sections all present and functional.

minor.issue: Top lists (referrers, browsers, devices, countries, platforms) show 'Unknown' with null name - this is expected per main agent notes because tracking events don't have full metadata

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - minor issue that doesn't affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics dashboard at /dashboard is fully functional. Backend endpoint GET /api/analytics/user-dashboard returns correct structure with all required fields (overview, views, unique_views, chart with 5 periods, top_referrers, top_browsers, top_devices, top_countries, top_platforms, button_clicks, listings). Scope filter (sitewide/account) works correctly - sitewide shows all data, account shows only user's own listings data. Listing filter is searchable and refreshes data correctly. Chart has 5 period toggles (24h, 7d, 30d, 6m, 12m) that all work correctly.

response_structure.button_clicks: array of click events by type
response_structure.listings: array of all listings for filter dropdown

top_lists.empty_state: Shows 'No data recorded yet.' when empty
